response.justification: Wei Chen has strong backend and distributed-systems experience, including event-driven architectures and microservices, but lacks direct evidence of leading multi-agent AI systems, fintech infrastructure, or scaling teams to 30+ in high-stakes commercial environments. Recent AI-agent work is promising but not yet production-grade or fintech-focused.
strengths: Strong distributed-systems expertise (event-driven platforms, microservices, real-time systems)
Proven leadership in scaling engineering teams (Optilyz, re:cinq) and improving engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD)
Diverse technical stack (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, Java) and hands-on architecture experience
concerns: No clear track record in multi-agent AI systems, fintech infrastructure, or regulated financial environments
Limited experience with production ML systems, real-time credit risk, or algorithmic working-capital management
Recent AI-agent work is exploratory (MCP, developer tooling) rather than commercial-grade system design

key_factors.factor: Fintech infrastructure and regulated environment exposure
Team scaling to 30+ in high-stakes commercial environments
